phenotypes.label: Abdominal pain recheck after reassuring ED evaluation
condition_terms: abdominal pain recheck after reassuring ed evaluation

terms: follow up for recheck as instructed

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports general abdominal pain framing, cautious home care, and conservative return precautions. This reviewed phenotype is limited to clinician-directed abdominal pain recheck after a reassuring ED evaluation.

phenotypes.label: Abscess after incision and drainage

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports skin abscess symptoms, pus drainage, fever or chills, and need to seek care for new symptoms after treatment.

phenotypes.label: Acute bronchitis or chest cold without pneumonia concern
condition_terms: acute bronchitis or chest cold without pneumonia concern

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support acute bronchitis and chest cold framing, viral predominance, supportive care, and escalation for worsening breathing symptoms. CDC outpatient guidance supports keeping pneumonia concern, abnormal vital signs, and focal lung findings outside uncomplicated bronchitis.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated acute otitis media without mastoiditis concern
condition_terms: uncomplicated acute otitis media without mastoiditis concern

terms: adult discharge diagnosis acute otitis media
adult patient with acute otitis media
adult diagnosed with acute otitis media
no perforation tube trauma foreign body hearing loss facial weakness vertigo
no mastoiditis perforation tube trauma foreign body hearing loss facial weakness vertigo meningitis concern

high_confidence_terms: adult discharge diagnosis acute otitis media

output_modifiers.label: Frail elderly follow-up modifier
output_modifiers.note: Shorten follow-up to 48 to 72 hours and confirm explicit return instructions.

output_modifiers.label: Diabetes follow-up modifier
output_modifiers.note: Confirm clinician-entered follow-up and return instructions because infection recovery may be less predictable.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus and CDC support acute otitis media/middle-ear infection framing, ear pain and fever symptom education, clinician-directed observation or antibiotic decisions, and escalation for severe or worsening illness. These sources do not independently support ED-specific risk stratification, antibiotic selection, pediatric dosing, or follow-up timing, so runtime must require adult clinician diagnosis, clinician-entered treatment instructions, and structured absence of ear red flags.

phenotypes.label: Acute sinusitis supportive care without antibiotic plan
condition_terms: acute sinusitis supportive care without antibiotic plan

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support sinusitis framing, symptom-based diagnosis, supportive care, and seeking care for severe or concerning symptoms. CDC outpatient guidance supports that most rhinosinusitis is viral, that antibiotics may not help many cases, and that bacterial-feature or antibiotic decisions require clinician judgment.

phenotypes.label: Adult constipation after reassuring ED assessment without obstruction or bleeding concern
condition_terms: adult constipation after reassuring ed assessment without obstruction or bleeding concern
adult constipation reassuring ed assessment no obstruction or bleeding

terms: no signs of an emergency cause were found on exam
no signs of an emergency cause were found on exam

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus and NIDDK support constipation symptom framing, hydration, fiber, activity, bowel routine, clinician-directed laxative use, and escalation for abdominal pain, bloating, nausea or vomiting, blood in stool, or obstruction symptoms. Medication choices and dosing remain clinician-entered only.

phenotypes.label: Allergic reaction resolved, no anaphylaxis

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports allergic reaction symptoms, hives or urticaria as a possible allergic presentation, anaphylaxis danger signs, epinephrine planning, and emergency escalation for airway or severe systemic symptoms.

phenotypes.label: Ankle sprain with negative x-ray
condition_terms: ankle sprain with negative x ray

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports home care, gradual activity, and return precautions. WikEM supports ED phenotype boundaries and must-not-miss framing only.

phenotypes.label: Asthma exacerbation improved for discharge

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports asthma symptoms, flare-up framing, trigger avoidance, prescribed inhaler use, and escalation for severe or life-threatening attacks.

phenotypes.label: Asymptomatic elevated blood pressure without end-organ symptoms
condition_terms: asymptomatic elevated blood pressure no end organ symptoms
asymptomatic elevated blood pressure without end-organ symptoms

terms: primary care blood pressure follow up

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports hypertension education and hypertensive crisis threshold framing. AHA supports emergency escalation when very high blood pressure is accompanied by symptoms such as chest pain, dyspnea, back pain, weakness, vision change, or difficulty speaking. ED medication initiation and follow-up timing remain clinician-entered.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated cellulitis treated as outpatient

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus and CDC support cellulitis treatment framing, antibiotic use when clinically indicated, and escalation for worsening or severe infection.

phenotypes.label: Low-risk chest pain after negative ED workup
condition_terms: chest pain low risk negative ed workup
low-risk chest pain after negative ed workup

source_audit.notes: AHA supports chest pain warning-sign education, but not static low-risk ED risk stratification. This draft is retired from ontology expansion and should remain product-layer fallback unless later rebuilt as a narrower reviewed phenotype.

phenotypes.label: Community-acquired pneumonia, outpatient

source_audit.notes: CDC supports pneumonia symptom framing, higher-risk host factors, and outpatient antibiotic-stewardship distinctions. Dosing and regimen selection remain outside the ontology until medication policy exists.

phenotypes.label: Concussion discharge without imaging red flags
condition_terms: concussion discharge no imaging red flags
concussion discharge without imaging red flags

source_audit.notes: CDC HEADS UP and CDC mild TBI guidance support danger signs, gradual return to activity, and clinician-directed return-to-school, work, driving, or play planning.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated conjunctivitis without contact lens or red flags
condition_terms: uncomplicated conjunctivitis without contact lens or red flags

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support conjunctivitis framing, hygiene and spread prevention, common symptoms, and escalation for pain, light sensitivity, blurred vision, intense redness, contact lens use, or worsening symptoms.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated contact dermatitis without systemic or infectious features
condition_terms: uncomplicated contact dermatitis without systemic or infectious features

terms: no mucosal lesions airway swelling infection concern
no skin peeling mucosal airway infection concern
no anaphylaxis infection or mucosal concern
no systemic allergic reaction or infection concern

output_modifiers.label: Frail or large-surface-area contact dermatitis modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag frailty or large body-surface involvement for clinician-entered follow-up review without changing the contact dermatitis text.

output_modifiers.label: Recurrent occupational exposure modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag recurrent occupational exposure for clinician-entered follow-up review without changing the contact dermatitis text.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports contact dermatitis as an irritant or allergic skin reaction after direct contact with a substance, avoidance of the trigger, moisturizers, clinician-directed topical therapy, and escalation for severe reactions, failure to improve, or infection signs. MedlinePlus allergic reaction content supports keeping airway symptoms, swelling, hypotension, epinephrine use, and systemic allergic reaction outside this pathway. Clinician-owner review on 2026-06-05 approved one shared adult contact dermatitis v1 after targeted plain-language, recovery-timeline, and return-precaution revisions.

phenotypes.label: Dental pain without deep-space infection
condition_terms: dental infection no deep space infection
dental pain no deep space infection

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports dental pain causes, need for dental evaluation, and urgent escalation for swelling, fever, trouble swallowing, or trouble breathing.

phenotypes.label: Acute traumatic elbow sprain with negative x-ray
condition_terms: acute traumatic elbow sprain with negative x-ray
acute traumatic elbow sprain xray negative
acute traumatic elbow strain xray negative
elbow soft tissue sprain xray negative
elbow sprain acute traumatic xray negative
elbow strain acute traumatic xray negative

adult with acute traumatic elbow strain
neurovascular exam intact including hand motor
motor in the hand is normal
motor sensory vascular intact in hand

high_confidence_terms: elbow sprain acute traumatic xray negative
acute traumatic elbow sprain xray negative
elbow strain acute traumatic xray negative
acute traumatic elbow strain xray negative
elbow soft tissue sprain xray negative

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports general sprain/strain framing, rest, protection, gradual return to activity, several-week recovery for bad sprains, and escalation for worsening pain, swelling, numbness, color change, fever, inability to move, or inability to walk. AAOS distal biceps and olecranon bursitis sources support blocking distal tendon rupture and posterior bursitis pathways. Clinician-owner review on 2026-06-05 approved one shared acute traumatic elbow sprain v1, including radial head contusion without fracture, with deferred split consideration for radial-head-specific rehab, ligament subtype, or distal-tendon-risk pathways if future product behavior needs different instructions.

phenotypes.label: Elbow overuse strain or epicondylitis with negative x-ray
condition_terms: elbow overuse strain or epicondylitis with negative x-ray

terms: neurovascular exam intact including hand motor
motor in the hand is normal
motor sensory vascular intact in hand

output_modifiers.label: Anticoagulation medication-safety modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag anticoagulation for clinician-entered medication and bleeding-risk review without changing the elbow overuse text.

output_modifiers.label: Immunocompromised follow-up modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag immunocompromise for clinician-entered follow-up and return-instruction review without changing the elbow overuse text.

source_audit.notes: AAOS supports lateral and medial epicondylitis as overuse elbow tendon conditions, x-ray use to rule out fracture or arthritis, nonsurgical care with activity reduction and therapy, and weeks-to-months recovery expectations for persistent cases. AAOS distal biceps and olecranon bursitis sources support blocking tendon rupture and bursitis pathways. Clinician-owner review on 2026-06-04 approved promotion after targeted patient-facing revisions.

phenotypes.label: Resolved nosebleed without posterior bleed concern
condition_terms: resolved nosebleed without posterior bleed concern

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports nosebleed first-aid concepts and when to seek care. AAO-HNS supports clinician-facing epistaxis guideline concepts, but ED discharge risk stratification still requires local clinician review.

phenotypes.label: Foot sprain with negative x-ray

terms: toes warm and well perfused with normal sensation

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports general sprain/strain framing and foot-sprain aftercare with protection, rest, ice, compression, elevation, mobility aids, gradual activity return, and escalation for worsening pain, swelling, numbness, color change, fever, or inability to walk. Clinician-owner review on 2026-06-05 approved this as one shared adult foot sprain v1 with current blockers intact, including Lisfranc or midfoot concern, inability to bear weight, inability to ambulate at discharge, high-energy mechanism, pediatric growth plate pathway, diabetic foot, vascular disease, and specialist-directed orthopedic plan.

phenotypes.label: Gastroenteritis, stable and able to hydrate
condition_terms: gastroenteritis, stable and able to hydrate

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports oral rehydration, gradual diet advancement, hygiene, and return precautions for dehydration, blood in stool, fever, and severe abdominal pain.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated hemorrhoids without heavy bleeding or infection concern
condition_terms: uncomplicated hemorrhoids without heavy bleeding or infection concern

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus and NIDDK support hemorrhoid self-care with fiber, fluids, warm baths, gentle local care, and clinician-recommended medicines. NIDDK supports urgent care for severe anal pain with rectal bleeding, especially with abdominal pain, diarrhea, or fever. Heavy bleeding, thrombosis/prolapse decisions, malignancy concern, and procedural planning remain clinician-governed.

phenotypes.label: Stable adult influenza-like illness with supportive-care discharge plan
condition_terms: influenza like illness stable supportive care
stable adult influenza-like illness with supportive-care discharge plan
high_confidence_terms: influenza like illness stable supportive care

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support flu symptom framing, home supportive care for mild illness, staying home while ill, emergency warning signs, high-risk host escalation, and antiviral treatment concepts. Antiviral medication selection and dosing remain clinician-entered only.

phenotypes.label: Simple laceration repair

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports laceration framing, wound infection signs, higher-risk wounds, and deeper structure concerns for tendons, nerves, vessels, or bone.

phenotypes.label: Lumbar strain without red flags

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports conservative low-back-pain care and red flags. WikEM supports ED phenotype boundaries and must-not-miss framing only.

phenotypes.label: Migraine improved after ED treatment

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports migraine symptom and treatment concepts. NINDS headache education supports secondary-headache warning concepts, including post-traumatic headache and systemic or neurologic concern. ED discharge risk stratification requires clinician review.

phenotypes.label: Minor head injury without red flags
condition_terms: minor head injury no red flags
minor head injury without red flags

source_audit.notes: CDC concussion guidance supports delayed symptoms, emergency danger signs, and gradual activity return after minor head trauma or possible concussion.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated otitis externa without mastoiditis concern
condition_terms: uncomplicated otitis externa without mastoiditis concern

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support swimmer's ear/otitis externa framing, ear-canal infection symptoms, drying/prevention concepts, treatment with clinician-directed drops, and escalation for fever, symptoms behind the ear, severe symptoms, or worsening illness.

phenotypes.label: Renal colic, stable, no infection concern
condition_terms: renal colic, stable, no infection concern

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports kidney stone self-care, hydration, urine straining when instructed, and escalation for fever, chills, vomiting, severe pain, cloudy urine, or urinary symptoms.

phenotypes.label: Simple skin avulsion, skin tear, or abrasion without repair need
condition_terms: simple skin avulsion, skin tear, or abrasion without repair need

terms: cleaned and dressed with wound care instructions
no foreign body deep structure infection concern
no retained foreign body deep structure injury infection concern

output_modifiers.note: Flag higher infection risk and confirm clinician-entered wound follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Peripheral vascular disease wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag slower healing risk and confirm clinician-entered wound follow-up.

output_modifiers.label: Anticoagulation bleeding modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag bleeding risk while preserving the simple-wound pathway.

output_modifiers.label: Delayed clean-wound presentation modifier
output_modifiers.note: For clean delayed wounds, confirm clinician-entered follow-up; contaminated or bite wounds remain blocked separately.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports cuts, punctures, skin breaks, wound healing, infection warning signs, and escalation for deep, dirty, bite, puncture, foot, or high-risk wounds. ED-specific decisions about repair need, tetanus, topical agents, and wound severity require clinician-entered context.

phenotypes.label: Knee or shoulder sprain or strain with negative x-ray
condition_terms: knee or shoulder sprain or strain with negative x-ray
sprain strain knee or shoulder xray negative

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports sprain/strain framing, several-week recovery for bad sprains, elevation/protection concepts, and escalation for worsening pain, swelling, numbness, or inability to move. Ankle-specific sources support general sprain principles only. This reviewed v1 is limited to documented knee or shoulder sprain/strain with x-ray performed and negative, intact neurovascular exam, and site-specific blockers.

deprecated non ankle sprain xray negative
sprain strain non ankle xray negative
high_confidence_terms: deprecated non ankle sprain xray negative

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports sprain/strain framing, several-week recovery for bad sprains, elevation/protection concepts, and escalation for worsening pain, swelling, numbness, or inability to move. Ankle-specific sources support general sprain aftercare principles only. ED use requires documented non-ankle site, x-ray performed and negative, intact neurovascular exam, and strong site-specific blockers.

condition_terms: suture removal or wound check no infection
suture removal or wound check without infection concern

clinician cleared wound at this visit

output_modifiers.label: Diabetes wound-healing modifier
output_modifiers.note: Flag higher infection/dehiscence risk and confirm clinician-entered follow-up.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports suture/staple wound care, infection warning signs, and following clinician instructions for wound care and removal timing. It does not support autonomous ED decisions about whether a wound is ready for removal, so runtime requires clinician-documented readiness and no infection/dehiscence concern.

phenotypes.label: Uncomplicated cystitis in a nonpregnant patient
condition_terms: uncomplicated cystitis in a nonpregnant patient

source_audit.notes: CDC and MedlinePlus support UTI framing, antibiotic treatment when clinically indicated, hydration, and pyelonephritis or sepsis return precautions.

phenotypes.label: Viral pharyngitis, strep negative

source_audit.notes: CDC supports viral sore throat antibiotic stewardship and group A strep testing distinctions, including not treating viral pharyngitis with antibiotics.

phenotypes.label: Viral upper respiratory infection without pneumonia
condition_terms: viral upper respiratory infection without pneumonia

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports viral URI supportive care and escalation symptoms. AHRQ supports antibiotic stewardship for uncomplicated viral URI.

phenotypes.label: Wrist sprain with negative x-ray

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports general sprain/strain aftercare and escalation. Wrist-specific v1 requires clinician documentation of absent scaphoid tenderness because an initially negative x-ray is not enough to exclude occult scaphoid injury.
